title: OpenGL Sandbox
description: C++ pixel sandbox with Conway's Game of Life, gravity, heat sims, and WASD player movement. Built from scratch pre-AI in raw OpenGL 3.3 + GLFW + ImGui. Web port via Claude in progress; Windows download below.
